PreToolUse.description: Block high-confidence catastrophic shell commands (rm -rf /, force-push to main, curl|sh, dd to disk, mkfs, chmod -R 777, fork bomb); warn on git reset --hard / git clean -f. Kill switch: NXTLVL_DANGEROUS_BASH=off.

C&M write path: record the START of every tool call (truncate ~5k, scrub secrets fail-closed, append to the observation log). Silent + fail-open. Skips subagents/the observer's own runs. Kill switch: NXTLVL_CM_CAPTURE=off.

PostToolUse.description: Two-stage context awareness: a primary FYI when live context crosses NXTLVL_CONTEXT_ALERT_TOKENS (default 200k), then a notify-only backstop at NXTLVL_CONTEXT_ALERT_BACKSTOP_TOKENS (default 325k). NXTLVL_CONTEXT_ALERT_NOTIFY=off suppresses the macOS notification; NXTLVL_CONTEXT_ALERT=off disables entirely.

C&M write path: record the COMPLETION of every tool call (truncate ~5k, scrub secrets fail-closed, append to the observation log). Silent + fail-open. Skips subagents/the observer's own runs. Kill switch: NXTLVL_CM_CAPTURE=off.

C&M distillation trigger: when >=20 observations have accrued, a per-session single-flight guard spawns one DETACHED claude-sonnet-4-6 observer that distills instincts in the background. Returns immediately; never blocks. Fail-open. Kill switch: NXTLVL_CM_OBSERVE=off.

UserPromptSubmit.description: Auto-title each session as "<folder> · <branch>" (folder-only when not on a branch), refreshed on every prompt so the title tracks branch changes mid-session. Never blocks the prompt. Kill switch: NXTLVL_SESSION_TITLE=off.

SessionStart.description: C&M read path: at session start, inject a "where you left off" briefing on top of CLAUDE.md/MEMORY.md — fresh git line, newest bookmark (with a staleness flag when the observation log is newer), and quality-gated strong instincts (naming any that didn't fit the ceiling → /evolve). additionalContext channel; absolute fail-open; skips the observer/subagents. Kill switch: NXTLVL_CM_BRIEFING=off.

SessionEnd.description: C&M lifecycle close: at session end, if the session was non-trivial (tool-calls ≥ 10 OR a commit/file-mutation occurred), write a dated "where I left off" bookmark for the current branch; always record a session-close metrics line. Derives counts/effect from the transcript (works with capture off). Side-effecting only; absolute fail-open; skips the observer/subagents. Kill switch: NXTLVL_CM_CLOSE=off.

PreCompact.description: C&M compaction steer: before a /compact or auto-compaction, emit summary-steer text only — preserve the current task + immediate next step, the active bookmark, and the key open files — so the task thread survives the summary. Writes nothing (no bookmark). additionalContext channel; absolute fail-open; skips the observer/subagents. Kill switch: NXTLVL_CM_PRECOMPACT=off.
